prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Alright, listen up! You’ve already taken the first step by recognizing that this task needs your attention. That’s huge! Now, remember that every big accomplishment starts with a single step. Break it down into manageable pieces, and tackle it one bit at a time. You’ve faced challenges before and come out stronger, and this is no different!

Visualize how great it will feel once you push through and check it off your list. You’ve got the skills, the determination, and the grit to conquer this! Dive in, focus on progress over perfection, and trust yourself. You can do this! Let’s turn that procrastination into action—now go and crush it! 🚀
